notes: Mocks pin skeleton dimensions to KPI-tile / chart / row containers so no layout shift when data lands. Two states + one empty state per component. Brand: please stand up the error copy library at company/brand/error_copy.md with 8 canonical keys (server_restarting, temporary_glitch, unauthorized, not_configured, no_data_yet, unknown_route, api_not_found, stale_data) plus per-page empty-state variants for F001/F002/F003.
review_criteria: Every canonical key from mocks has a phrasing in error_copy.md
Empty-state copy per-page (F001/F002/F003 variants distinct from error)
Zero banned phrases (Error 500, undefined, stack traces, Failed to fetch)
